Cross-reference for Ontologi for marine observatorier classes, object properties and data properties back to ToC

This section provides details for each class and property defined by Ontologi for marine observatorier.

Classes

  • Cruise Summary Report
  • Delområde for observasjon
  • Discipline
  • ERIC
  • Finansiert prosjekt
  • Foreldet klasse
  • Forskningsprosjekt
  • Kampanje
  • Medlemskap i et ERIC
  • Observasjonsplattform
  • Observasjonssted
  • point
  • Regional fasilitet
  • Research Infrastructure
  • Serie med havforskningskampanjer
  • SpatialThing
  • Underplattform for observasjon

Cruise Summary Reportc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://purl.org/org/iode/po/voc/cruise-summary-reports#CruiseSummaryReport

is equivalent to
Kampanje c

Delområde for observasjonc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Subsite

Et delområde for observasjon, en finere komponent av et sted, som muliggjør økt romlig granularitet for måling eller instrumentering.
has super-classes
Observasjonssted c
has sub-classes
Observasjonsplattform c
is in domain of
Dato for første utplassering dp, Nettsted har breddegrad op, Site has Longitude op, Sluttdato for utplassering dp, Subsite contains a platform op, Subsite is part of an Research Infrastructure op, er teststed dp, has geometry op, has max depth dp, has min depth dp
is in range of
Site has a subsite op, har delområde op
has members
ANTARES ni, BJS ni, Capelinhos ni, Cimendef ni, Crystal ni, Cyprès ni, East vulcano ni, Isabel ni, Lava Lake ni, Mont Segur ni, Sapin ni, Sintra ni, South Crystal ni, Surface ni, Tour Eiffel ni, White Castle ni, Y3 ni

Disciplinec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Discipline

List of EMSO scientific disciplines associated to a Regional Facility
has super-classes
Thing c
has members
Geosciences ni, Physical oceanography ni

ERICc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#ERIC

A European Research Infrastructure Consortium established under the ERIC legal framework to support long-term scientific collaboration and shared research services.
has super-classes
Research Infrastructure c
is in domain of
ERIC federated a Research Infrastructure op, ERIC has a Director General op, is managed by op
is in range of
Organisation is member of an ERIC op, medlemskap i et ERIC op
has members
EMBRC ni, EMSO ni

Finansiert prosjektc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#FundedProject

Et forskningsprosjekt støttet av dedikert finansiering fra en eller flere organisasjoner eller finansieringskilder.
has super-classes
Forskningsprosjekt c
is in domain of
har logo op, har romlig utstrekning op
has members
Atlantic Whale Deal ni, CLASS ni, EMSO EVOLVE ni, EUXINUS ni, LIFE Marha ni, MARMOR ni, REVOSIMA ni, ScInObs (Science, Innovation et Observatoires sous-marins) ni, Tam Tam ni

Foreldet klassec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#ObsoleteClass

Rotklasse som grupperer foreldede OSO-klasser.

Forskningsprosjektc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#ResearchProject

En strukturert vitenskapelig aktivitet som har som mål å produsere ny kunnskap, data eller forståelse innenfor et definert omfang og tidsrom.
has super-classes
Project c
has sub-classes
Finansiert prosjekt c
is in domain of
Project is led by an organisation op
is in range of
Regional Facility is linked to a project op

Kampanjec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#OceanographicCampaign

En havforskningskampanje knyttet til en regional infrastruktur
has super-classes
Activity c, Serie med havforskningskampanjer c
is in domain of
DOI dp
is in range of
Regional Facility is linked to Cruise op
has members
AIMSIR ni, EMSO SA ni, KANADEEP 2 ni, KASEASPACE ni, LUCKYDIVMIC ni, MARNAUT ni

Medlemskap i et ERICc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#ERICMembership

A class representing the membership relationship between an organisation or national entity and a European Research Infrastructure Consortium (ERIC).
is in domain of
er medlemskap i et ERIC for op, medlemskap i et ERIC op
is in range of
har medlemskap i et ERIC op
has members
Azores E M S O membership ni, Balearic Sea E M S O membership ni, Black Sea E M S O membership ni, Canarias E M S O membership ni, Celtic Seas E M S O membership ni, Cretan Sea E M S O membership ni, Hellenic Arc E M S O membership ni, Iberian Margin E M S O membership ni, Iroise E M S O membership ni, Ligurian Sea E M S O membership ni, Nordic Seas E M S O membership ni, Porcupine Abyssal Plain E M S O membership ni, South Adriatic Sea E M S O membership ni, Western Ionian Sea E M S O membership ni, Western Mediterranean Sea E M S O membership ni

Observasjonsplattformc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Platform

En observasjonsplattform, fast eller mobil, installert på et sted eller underområde, som støtter ett eller flere instrumenter eller innhentingssystemer.
Source
http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/collection/L06/current/
has super-classes
Delområde for observasjon c
has sub-classes
Underplattform for observasjon c
is in domain of
Dato for første utplassering dp, Platform has a Principal Investigator op, Sluttdato for utplassering dp, has max depth dp, has min depth dp, has platform category op
is in range of
Site contains a Platform op, Subsite contains a platform op
has members
ALBATROSS ni, BB mooring ni, BJS BathyBot ni, BJS BathyDock ni, BJS Seabed Station ni, Billion Mooring ni, CTD ni, Calipso Seabed Station ni, Central Farm Strait Subsurface mooring ni, DAS ni, DYFAMED Buoy ODAS ni, DYFAMED Mugobs ni, DYFAMED mooring ni, Dione Seabed Station ni, E1M3A mooring ni, E2M3A buoy ni, E2M3A mooring ni, EDOKKO ni, ESTOC Autonomous Devices ni, ESTOC Moored Surface Buoy ni, ESTOC Subsurface gliders ni, ESTOC Subsurface mooring ni, East of Gran Canaria Autonomous Devices ni, East of Gran Canaria Seabed Station ni, EuxRo01 surface buoy ni, EuxRo02 seabed station ni, EuxRo02 surface buoy ni, EuxRo03 seabed station ni, EuxRo03 surface buoy ni, FF mooring ni, Galatea Mooring ni, IL07 ni, IbMa-CS TUPEM SubSurface Mooring ni, IbMa-CSV Sao Vicente Canyon ni, IbMa-CSV Seabed Station ni, IbMa-CSV TUPEM Fixed SubSurface Vertical Profiler ni, Lion mooring ni, Lucky Strike AutonomousDevices ni, Lucky Strike Hydrographic mooring ni, M A R L E Y ni, MII ni, Marmara Autonomous Devices ni, Mayotte CC Node 1 ni, Mayotte CC Node 2 ni, Mayotte CC Node 3 ni, Mayotte CC Node 4 ni, Mohn Seabed Station ni, Mohn Subsurface mooring ni, Molène AutonomousDevices ni, Molène Submarine Platform ni, Nice East station ni, Nice West station ni, OBSEA buoy ni, OBSEA seabed station ni, ODAS Italia 1 ni, PYLOS Buoy ni, PYLOS Platform ni, Poulmic Platform ni, R1 SmartCable ni, R2 SmartCable ni, R3 SmartCable ni, SN1 Seabed Station ni, SeaMoN East ni, SeaMoN West ni, Smartbay Buoy ni, Smartbay Observatory ni, South Cape Seabed Station ni, South Cape Subsurface Mooring ni, South Rockall Trough Mooring ni, Station M Subsurface Mooring ni, Surface BOREL ni, Svinøy North Subsurface Mooring ni, Svinøy South Subsurface Mooring ni, W1M3A Mooring ni, West Lake ni, benthic station ni, mooring line A ni, mooring line B ni, mooring line C ni, node1 ni, node2 ni, node3 ni, node4 ni, pilot line ni, profil CTD ni

Observasjonsstedc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Site

Et lokalisert observasjonssted tilknyttet en regional fasilitet, som potensielt huser en eller flere måleplattformer.
has super-classes
Regional fasilitet c
has sub-classes
Delområde for observasjon c
is in domain of
Dato for første utplassering dp, Distance from land dp, Nettsted har breddegrad op, Site contains a Platform op, Site has Longitude op, Site has a Site Responsible op, Site has a subsite op, Site is led by op, Site is part of an Research Infrastructure op, Sluttdato for utplassering dp, er teststed dp, har delområde op, has geometry op, has max depth dp, has min depth dp
is in range of
Regional Facility contains a Site op, has site op
has members
Antigonia ni, BB ni, BILLION ni, CONDOR ni, Calipso ni, Central Fram Strait ni, DYFAMED ni, Dione ni, E1M3A ni, E2M3A ni, ESTOC ni, EuxRo01 ni, EuxRo02 ni, EuxRo03 ni, FF ni, Galatea ni, H4 ni, IbMa-CSV ni, IbMa-N ni, IbMa-N ni, LION ni, LO ni, Lampaul Canyon ni, Lucky Strike ni, Marmara ni, Mayotte site ni, Mohn ni, Molène ni, Molène ni, Munida ni, Nice ni, OBSEA ni, P4 ni, PAP Central Site ni, PYLOS ni, Poulmic ni, R1 ni, R2 ni, R3 ni, SN-4 ni, SN1 ni, Smartbay ni, South Cape ni, Station M ni, Stylaster ni, Svinøy ni, Sørlige Rockall-renna ni, Vanuatu Trench Site ni, W1M3A ni, Øst for Gran Canaria ni

pointc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#Point

Uniquely identified by lat/long/alt. i.e. spaciallyIntersects(P1, P2) :- lat(P1, LAT), long(P1, LONG), alt(P1, ALT), lat(P2, LAT), long(P2, LONG), alt(P2, ALT). sameThing(P1, P2) :- type(P1, Point), type(P2, Point), spaciallyIntersects(P1, P2).
has super-classes
SpatialThing c

Regional fasilitetc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#RegionalFacility

Regional fasilitet som inneholder lokaliteter, tilknyttet forskningsinfrastrukturer, havkampanjer, organisasjoner og en regionalt ansvarlig.
has super-classes
Thing c
has sub-classes
Observasjonssted c
is in domain of
Dato for første utplassering dp, Distance from land dp, Regional Facility contains a Site op, Regional Facility has a bouding box op, Regional Facility is associated with a Research Infrastructure op, Regional Facility is linked to Cruise op, Regional Facility is linked to a Series of Cruises op, Regional Facility is linked to a project op, Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op, Regional Facility is part of a Research Infrastructure op, Regional Facility is related to a Research Infrastructure op, Regional Faciliy has a Regional Team Leader op, Sluttdato for utplassering dp, har land op, har medlemskap i et ERIC op, has location op, has max depth dp, has min depth dp, has site op
is in range of
er medlemskap i et ERIC for op
has members
Azores ni, Balearhavet ni, Bay of Biscay canyons ni, Black Sea ni, Canarias ni, Celtic Seas ni, Condor undervannsfjell ni, Cretan Sea ni, Hellenic Arc ni, Iberian Margin ni, Iroise ni, Liguriahavet ni, Marmara Sea ni, Mayotte ni, New Caledonia ni, Nordic Seas ni, Porcupine Abyssal Plain ni, Sørlige Adriaterhavet ni, Vanuatu-gropen ni, Vestlige joniske hav ni, Western Mediterranean Sea ni

Research Infrastructurec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#ResearchInfrastructure

A research infrastructure may bring together one or more Regional Facilities
The following definition for RI from Article 2 (6) of the Regulation (EU) No 1291/2013 of 11 December 2013: `Establishing Horizon 2020 - the Framework Programme for Research and Innovation (2014- 2020)` applies: “RI are facilities, resources and services that are used by the research communities to conduct research and foster innovation in their fields. They include: major scientific equipment (or sets of instruments), knowledge-based resources such as collections, archives and scientific data, einfrastructures, such as data and computing systems and communication networks and any other tools that are essential to achieve excellence in research and innovation.” Accordingly, RI are implemented along different organisational models, including central sources and laboratories for experiments and measurement sessions, coordination and management of geographically distributed observatories or laboratories, remotely accessible resources for computing, data banks, physical sample repositories, surveys and longitudinal studies.
has super-classes
Organisation c, Organization c
has sub-classes
ERIC c
is in domain of
Research Infrastructure is led by op, har land op, is managed by op
is in range of
ERIC federated a Research Infrastructure op, Regional Facility is associated with a Research Infrastructure op, Regional Facility is part of a Research Infrastructure op, Regional Facility is related to a Research Infrastructure op, Site is part of an Research Infrastructure op, Subsite is part of an Research Infrastructure op
has members
E M S O Italia ni, EMBRC-France ni, EMSO Portugal ni, EMSO-France ni, NorEMSO ni

Serie med havforskningskampanjerc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#SeriesOfOceanographicCampaigns

En serie med havforskningskampanjer knyttet til en regional infrastruktur.
has super-classes
Thing c
has sub-classes
Kampanje c
is in domain of
DOI dp
is in range of
Regional Facility is linked to a Series of Cruises op
has members
CHEREEF-OBS ni, EMSO LIGURE OUEST ni, HYDROMOMAR ni, KASEAOPE ni, MARMESONET ni, MARSITECRUISE ni, MAYOBS ni, MOMARSAT ni, MOOSE-GE ni, MUG-OBS ni

SpatialThingc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#SpatialThing

Anything with spatial extent, i.e. size, shape, or position. e.g. people, places, bowling balls, as well as abstract areas like cubes.
has sub-classes
point c
is in domain of
altitude ap, latitude ap, longitude ap
is in range of
location op

Underplattform for observasjonc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#SubPlatform

En underplattform for observasjon, en komponent eller spesifikt segment av en plattform, dedikert til en bestemt måletype eller instrumentkonfigurasjon.
has super-classes
Observasjonsplattform c
is in domain of
Dato for første utplassering dp, Sluttdato for utplassering dp
has members
Lucky Strike EGIM ni, Svinøy North ni, Svinøy South ni

Regional fasilitet c

Relates a site to a subdivision or component subsite.

has range
Delområde for observasjon c

har en EDMOop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasEDMO

Denne egenskapen kobler en organisasjon til dens EDMO-identifikator (European Directory of Marine Organisations).
has domain
Organization c
has range
Resource c

har en RORop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasROR

Denne egenskapen kobler en organisasjon til dens ROR-identifikator (Research Organization Registry).

has characteristics: functional

has domain
Organization c

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasCountry

has super-properties
address Country op
has domain
Organization c
Regional fasilitet c
Research Infrastructure c

Country c

Image c

har medlemskap i et ERICop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasERICMembership

Links a regional facility to its membership within an ERIC infrastructure.
has domain
Regional fasilitet c
has range
Medlemskap i et ERIC c
is inverse of
er medlemskap i et ERIC for op

har romlig utstrekningop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasSpatialExtent

Relates an entity to its geographical extent, such as a bounding box or spatial coverage.
has super-properties
has Geometry op
has domain
Finansiert prosjekt c
has range
Bounding Box c

has geometryop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasGeometry

has characteristics: functional

has domain
Observasjonssted c
Delområde for observasjon c
has range
Geometry c

has locationop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasLocation

Associates an entity with a geographical location description or geometry.
has domain
Regional fasilitet c
has range
Geometry c

has platform categoryop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasPlatformCategory

Links a platform instance to a controlled concept from the NERC L06 SeaVoX Platform Categories vocabulary.
has domain
Observasjonsplattform c
has range
Concept c

has siteop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#hasSite

Associates an infrastructure or system with one or more observation sites.
has sub-properties
Site is led by op
has domain
Regional fasilitet c
has range
Observasjonssted c

is managed byop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#isManagedBy

Links a research infrastructure (ERIC or national) to the organisation that manages or coordinates it.
has domain
ERIC c
Research Infrastructure c
has range
Organization c

has range

annotation property

Data Properties

  • Dato for første utplassering
  • Distance from land
  • DOI
  • East Longitude
  • er teststed
  • has max depth
  • has min depth
  • North Latitude
  • Sluttdato for utplassering
  • South Latitude
  • West Longitude

Dato for første utplasseringdp back to ToC or Data Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#dateFirstDeployment

Date of the first deployment of an instrument, platform, or infrastructure.
has super-properties
start Date dp

Atlantic Whale Dealni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Atlantic_Whale_Deal

belongs to
Finansiert prosjekt c
has facts
homepage op atlantic whale deal ni
Project is led by an organisation op ARDITI ni
har land op Frankrike ni
har land op Irland ni
har land op Portugal ni
har land op Spania ni
har logo op Atlantic Whale Deal.png ni
har romlig utstrekning op Atlantic WhaleDeal Bouding box ni
end Date dp "2026-11-30"^^date
start Date dp "2023-12-01"^^date
description ap "The ATLANTIC WHALE DEAL aims to make sure that ships don't accidentally hit whales in the Atlantic Area. Partners from different countries are working together to prevent these collisions that can damage biodiversity, trying out new and smart technologies to reduce ship strikes. They want to help the environment by capturing carbon (which is good for the planet) and making sure the ecosystem works well. This involves localization techniques to find whales, making maps to show where there's a risk of collisions, and creating tools to reduce noise in the ocean. A team of experts in physics, engineering, biology, statistics, design, and social economics from four countries is teaming up with different organizations like the government, non-profit groups, schools, and businesses. The goal is to find solutions that work well and help society while also taking care of the planet. ATLANTIC WHALE DEAL believes that by protecting whales, they're also making a positive impact on the world by keeping the environment healthy and preserving biodiversity."
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@el
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@en
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@es
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@fr
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@it
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@no
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@pt
title ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@ro
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@el
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@en
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@es
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@fr
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@it
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@no
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@pt
preferred label ap "Atlantic Whale Deal"@ro

Black Seani back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Black_Sea

The Black Sea is one of the largest regional seas of the Eurasian continent and unique in many of its geographical, geological, biological, hydrographical and socio-political characteristics. With anoxic conditions in the deep, problems with invasive species and high sediment loads delivered to the system, this area has unique problems requiring long-term stations. The Black Sea is located in a geological complex area, where three major tectonic plates (Eurasian, Anatolian, Arabian) interact. Geo hazards, such as earthquarkes, submarine landslide, displacement along active faults, are present and are possible triggers of tsunami, together with extreme meteorological events.
belongs to
Regional fasilitet c
has facts
Regional Facility is linked to a project op EUXINUS ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op EuxRo01 ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op EuxRo02 ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op EuxRo03 ni
Regional Facility has a bouding box op Black Sea Regional Facility bounding box ni
har medlemskap i et ERIC op Black Sea E M S O membership ni
Regional Faciliy has a Regional Team Leader op Vlad Rădulescu ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op GeoEcoMar ni
Distance from land dp "97"^^integer
Dato for første utplassering dp "2013-06-01"^^date
has max depth dp "95"^^integer
has min depth dp "15"^^integer
spatial dp Black Sea ep
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@el
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@en
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@es
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@fr
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@it
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@no
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@pt
preferred label ap "Black Sea"@ro

Canariasni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Canarias

Canarias Regional Facility is linked to the Atlantic Whale Deal project (issue concerning collision with marine mammals)
belongs to
Regional fasilitet c
has facts
homepage op ocean observatory ni
Regional Facility is linked to a project op Atlantic Whale Deal ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op ESTOC ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op Øst for Gran Canaria ni
har medlemskap i et ERIC op Canarias E M S O membership ni
Regional Faciliy has a Regional Team Leader op Eric DELORY ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op CSIC ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op PLOCAN ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op ULPGC ni
Distance from land dp "60"^^integer
Dato for første utplassering dp "1994-01-01"^^date
has max depth dp "3630"^^integer
description ap "EMSO Canarias, a.k.a. ESTOC (29º10’ N, 15º30’ W) is a monitoring time-series program. The station is located within the weak southward return flows on the Eastern side of the North Atlantic subtropical gyre. ESTOC is an open ocean site, located well outside of the highly variable Eastern boundary with its strong coastal upwelling regime (although interaction with this regime exists). The site is sufficiently deep to encompass the Eastern subtropical North Atlantic’s major water masses including the North Atlantic Deep Water (except the AABW). ESTOC is windward of the Canary Islands to avoid wake effects of both the major currents and winds (Canary Current and Northeast Trade Winds), and is far enough from coasts and islands to serve as reference for satellite images and altimetry."@en
spatial dp Canary islands ep
preferred label ap "Canarias"@el
preferred label ap "Canarias"@en
preferred label ap "Canarias"@es
preferred label ap "Canarias"@fr
preferred label ap "Canarias"@it
preferred label ap "Canarias"@no
preferred label ap "Canarias"@pt
preferred label ap "Canarias"@ro

CLASSni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#CLASS

CLASS will deliver the knowledge and understanding of the Atlantic Ocean system that society needs to make evidence-based decisions regarding ocean management. We aim to address key knowledge gaps in our understanding of ocean variability, climate regulation and ocean services, and to assess how the ocean will evolve as a result of climate change and intensified human exploitation. CLASS will be delivered through an Atlantic focused science programme, building on sustained ocean observation, world class model development and state of the art technology, delivered through Marine National Capability underpinning activities.
belongs to
Finansiert prosjekt c
has facts
homepage op https://projects.noc.ac.uk/class-project/ ni
har land op Storbritannia ni
har logo op class.jpg ni
end Date dp "2024-04"^^g Year Month
start Date dp "2018-04"^^g Year Month
description ap "CLASS will deliver the knowledge and understanding of the Atlantic Ocean system that society needs to make evidence-based decisions regarding ocean management. We aim to address key knowledge gaps in our understanding of ocean variability, climate regulation and ocean services, and to assess how the ocean will evolve as a result of climate change and intensified human exploitation. CLASS will be delivered through an Atlantic focused science programme, building on sustained ocean observation, world class model development and state of the art technology, delivered through Marine National Capability underpinning activities."
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@el
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@en
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@es
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@fr
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@it
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@no
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@pt
title ap "CLASS (Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science)"@ro
alternative label ap "Climate Linked Atlantic Sector Science"@en
definition ap "CLASS will deliver the knowledge and understanding of the Atlantic Ocean system that society needs to make evidence-based decisions regarding ocean management. We aim to address key knowledge gaps in our understanding of ocean variability, climate regulation and ocean services, and to assess how the ocean will evolve as a result of climate change and intensified human exploitation. CLASS will be delivered through an Atlantic focused science programme, building on sustained ocean observation, world class model development and state of the art technology, delivered through Marine National Capability underpinning activities."@en
note ap "CLASS"@en
preferred label ap "CLASS"@el
preferred label ap "CLASS"@en
preferred label ap "CLASS"@es
preferred label ap "CLASS"@fr
preferred label ap "CLASS"@it
preferred label ap "CLASS"@no
preferred label ap "CLASS"@pt
preferred label ap "CLASS"@ro

E1M3Ani back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#E1M3A

belongs to
Observasjonssted c
has facts
Site contains a Platform op E1M3A mooring ni
Site has a Site Responsible op Leonidas PERIVOLIOTIS ni
er teststed dp "false"^^boolean
description ap "The E1M3A marine observatory is a pioneer station, the first open-ocean buoy in the Mediterranean deployed in January 2000 and currently part of the POSEIDON network since 2007. The Poseidon system operates a network of fixed measuring floats, which are moored at various locations in the Aegean and Ionian seas delivering near-real-time observations on important marine and atmospheric parameters. The oceanographic buoys constitute the backbone of the POSEIDON system and they are linked to both global and regional networks such as the OceanSITES and M3A’s respectively. In particular the POSEIDON E1 M3A buoy (WMO 61277) is the founder component of the Cretan Sea observatory complemented with several other platforms such as glider, FerryBox and a coastal buoy and is currently the most heavily equipped physical–biogeochemical observing site of the POSEIDON system."@en
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@el
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@en
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@es
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@fr
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@it
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@no
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@pt
preferred label ap "E1M3A"@ro

EMSO EVOLVEni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#EMSO_EVOLVE

belongs to
Finansiert prosjekt c
has facts
Project is led by an organisation op European Commission ni
har land op European Union ni
identifier dp "HORIZON-INFRA-2025-01"
end Date dp "2030-08-31"^^date
start Date dp "2026-09-01"^^date
description ap "EMSO EVOLVE er et europeisk prosjekt som støtter langsiktige havobservasjoner og miljømessig bærekraft innenfor rammen av EMSO ERIC."@no
description ap "EMSO EVOLVE es un proyecto europeo que apoya las observaciones oceánicas a largo plazo y la sostenibilidad medioambiental en el marco de EMSO ERIC."@es
description ap "EMSO EVOLVE est un projet européen soutenant les observations océaniques à long terme et la durabilité environnementale dans le cadre d’EMSO ERIC."@fr
description ap "EMSO EVOLVE este un proiect european care sprijină observațiile oceanice pe termen lung și sustenabilitatea de mediu în cadrul EMSO ERIC."@ro
description ap "EMSO EVOLVE is a European project supporting long-term ocean observations and environmental sustainability within the EMSO ERIC framework."@en
description ap "EMSO EVOLVE è un progetto europeo che sostiene le osservazioni oceaniche a lungo termine e la sostenibilità ambientale nel quadro di EMSO ERIC."@it
description ap "EMSO EVOLVE é um projeto europeu que apoia observações oceânicas de longo prazo e a sustentabilidade ambiental no quadro do EMSO ERIC."@pt
description ap "Το EMSO EVOLVE είναι ένα ευρωπαϊκό έργο που υποστηρίζει τις μακροπρόθεσμες ωκεάνιες παρατηρήσεις και την περιβαλλοντική βιωσιμότητα στο πλαίσιο του EMSO ERIC."@el
title ap "European VisiOn for Long-term Ocean Observations and EnVironmEntal Sustainability (EMSO EVOLVE)"@en
title ap "Europeisk visjon for langsiktige havobservasjoner og miljømessig bærekraft (EMSO EVOLVE)"@no
title ap "Vision européenne pour les observations océaniques à long terme et la durabilité environnementale (EMSO EVOLVE)"@fr
title ap "Visione europea per osservazioni oceaniche a lungo termine e sostenibilità ambientale (EMSO EVOLVE)"@it
title ap "Visión europea para observaciones oceánicas a largo plazo y sostenibilidad medioambiental (EMSO EVOLVE)"@es
title ap "Visão europeia para observações oceânicas de longo prazo e sustentabilidade ambiental (EMSO EVOLVE)"@pt
title ap "Viziune europeană pentru observații oceanice pe termen lung și sustenabilitate de mediu (EMSO EVOLVE)"@ro
title ap "Ευρωπαϊκό Όραμα για μακροπρόθεσμες ωκεάνιες παρατηρήσεις και περιβαλλοντική βιωσιμότητα (EMSO EVOLVE)"@el
alternative label ap "European VisiOn for Long-term Ocean Observations and EnVironmEntal Sustainability"@en
alternative label ap "Europeisk visjon for langsiktige havobservasjoner og miljømessig bærekraft"@no
alternative label ap "Horizon Europe INFRA programme"@en

EMSO-Franceni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#EMSO-France

belongs to
Research Infrastructure c
is same as
0312sjw67 ni
has facts
homepage op www-emso-fr-org: ni
homepage op fr ni
Research Infrastructure is led by op Dominique LEFEVRE ni
Research Infrastructure is led by op Nadine LANTERI ni
har land op Frankrike ni
is managed by op CNRS ni
is managed by op Ifremer ni
description ap "A infraestrutura de investigação EMSO-France, incluída no roteiro do MESR, coordena as iniciativas francesas sobre observatórios submarinos do programa europeu e promove a sua abertura a uma ampla gama de equipas e disciplinas. O envolvimento de França baseia-se na sua experiência em gestão de dados, inovação tecnológica e na seleção estratégica dos locais de implantação: o sítio dos Açores na dorsal médio-atlântica, na ZEE de Portugal, o sítio do Mar da Ligúria, a leste na encosta de Nice e a oeste na zona profunda do talude continental, ligado ao telescópio de neutrinos do IN2P3, o sítio do Mar de Mármara ao longo da falha norte da Anatólia, o sítio de teste no Mar de Iroise, inicialmente ao largo de Molène, atualmente em relocalização para o porto de Brest."@pt
description ap "EMSO-France Research Infrastructure, included in the MESR roadmap, coordinates French initiatives on underwater observatories within the European programme and promotes their openness to a wide range of teams and disciplines. France’s involvement is driven by its expertise in data management, technological innovation, and the strategic selection of observatory deployment sites: the Azores site on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge, within Portugal’s EEZ, the Ligurian Sea site, east on the Nice slope and west in the deep continental margin area, linked to the IN2P3 neutrino telescope, the Marmara Sea site along the North Anatolian Fault, the Iroise Sea test site, initially located offshore Molène, currently being relocated to Brest harbour."@en
description ap "EMSO-France forskningsinfrastruktur, inkludert i MESR sin veikart, koordinerer franske initiativer for undervannsobservatorier innen det europeiske programmet og fremmer deres åpning for et bredt spekter av team og fagområder. Frankrikes engasjement bygger på kompetanse innen databehandling, teknologisk innovasjon og strategisk valg av lokaliteter: Azorene på den midtatlantiske ryggen, innenfor Portugals økonomiske sone, det liguriske hav, øst ved Nice-skråningen og vest i den dype kontinentalskråningen, knyttet til IN2P3s nøytrinoteleskop, Marmarahavet langs den nordanatoliske forkastningen, teststedet i Iroisehavet, opprinnelig utenfor Molène, nå under relokalisering til Brest havn."@no
description ap "Infrastructura de cercetare EMSO-France, inclusă în foaia de parcurs MESR, coordonează inițiativele franceze privind observatoarele submarine din programul european și promovează deschiderea acestora către o gamă largă de echipe și discipline. Implicarea Franței se bazează pe expertiza în gestionarea datelor, inovare tehnologică și selecția strategică a locațiilor: situl Azorelor pe dorsala medio-atlantică, în ZEE Portugaliei, sitului Mării Ligurice, la est pe panta de la Nisa și la vest în zona adâncă a taluzului continental, legat de telescopul de neutrini IN2P3, sitului Mării Marmara pe falia nord-anatoliană, situl de testare din Marea Iroise, inițial în largul Molène, în curs de relocare în portul Brest."@ro
description ap "La Infraestructura de Investigación EMSO-France, incluida en la hoja de ruta del MESR, coordina las iniciativas francesas sobre observatorios submarinos del programa europeo y promueve su apertura a un amplio abanico de equipos y disciplinas. La implicación de Francia se basa en su experiencia en gestión de datos, innovación tecnológica y en la elección estratégica de los emplazamientos de los observatorios: el sitio de las Azores en la dorsal mesoatlántica, dentro de la ZEE de Portugal, el sitio del mar de Liguria, al este en la pendiente de Niza y al oeste en la zona profunda del margen continental, vinculado al telescopio de neutrinos del IN2P3, el sitio del mar de Mármara en la falla de Anatolia del Norte, el sitio de ensayo en el mar de Iroise, inicialmente frente a Molène, actualmente en proceso de traslado a la rada de Brest."@es
description ap "L’infrastructure de recherche EMSO-France, inscrite dans la feuille de route du MESR, coordonne les initiatives françaises sur les observatoires sous-marins du programme européen et favorise leur ouverture à un large éventail d’équipes et de disciplines. L’engagement de la France repose sur son expertise en gestion de données, en innovation technologique et sur le choix stratégique des sites d’implantation des observatoires : le site des Açores sur la dorsale médio-atlantique, dans la ZEE du Portugal, le site de la mer Ligure, à l’est sur la pente de Nice et à l’ouest dans la zone profonde du talus continental, en lien avec le télescope à neutrinos de l’IN2P3, le site de la mer de Marmara sur la faille nord-anatolienne, le site d’essai en mer d’Iroise, initialement au large de Molène, en cours de relocalisation en rade de Brest."@fr
description ap "L’infrastruttura di ricerca EMSO-France, inclusa nella roadmap del MESR, coordina le iniziative francesi sugli osservatori sottomarini del programma europeo e ne promuove l’apertura a un’ampia gamma di team e discipline. Il coinvolgimento della Francia si basa sulla sua esperienza nella gestione dei dati, nell’innovazione tecnologica e nella selezione strategica dei siti di installazione: il sito delle Azzorre sulla dorsale medio-atlantica, nella ZEE del Portogallo, il sito del Mar Ligure, a est sulla scarpata di Nizza e a ovest nella zona profonda del margine continentale, collegato al telescopio a neutrini dell’IN2P3, il sito del Mar di Marmara lungo la faglia nord-anatolica, il sito di prova nel mare d’Iroise, inizialmente al largo di Molène, attualmente in fase di trasferimento nel porto di Brest."@it
description ap "Η Ερευνητική Υποδομή EMSO-France, ενταγμένη στον οδικό χάρτη του MESR, συντονίζει τις γαλλικές πρωτοβουλίες για τα υποθαλάσσια παρατηρητήρια του ευρωπαϊκού προγράμματος και προωθεί το άνοιγμά τους σε όσο το δυνατόν περισσότερες ομάδες και επιστημονικά πεδία. Η συμμετοχή της Γαλλίας βασίζεται στον ρόλο της στη διαχείριση δεδομένων, στην τεχνολογική καινοτομία και στην επιλογή των θέσεων εγκατάστασης των παρατηρητηρίων: τοποθεσία των Αζορών στη Μεσο-Ατλαντική Ράχη, εντός της ΑΟΖ της Πορτογαλίας, τοποθεσία της Λιγυρίας Θάλασσας, ανατολικά στην πλαγιά της Νίκαιας και στη βαθιά ζώνη του ηπειρωτικού περιθωρίου, δυτικά, σε σύνδεση με το τηλεσκόπιο νετρίνων του IN2P3, τοποθεσία της Θάλασσας του Μαρμαρά πάνω στο ρήγμα της Βόρειας Ανατολίας, ο δοκιμαστικός χώρος στη Θάλασσα της Ιρουάζ, αρχικά εγκατεστημένος ανοικτά της Molène, σε διαδικασία μετεγκατάστασης στον όρμο της Βρέστης."@el
identifier dp 0312sjw67 ni

EUXINUSni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#EUXINUS

IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS er et regionalt sikkerhetssystem for det vestlige Svartehavet som gir sanntidsvarsler om marine geologiske farer, som undersjøiske skred, bevegelser langs aktive forkastninger, undersjøiske jordskjelv og tsunamibølger, samtidig som det overvåker egenskapene og dynamikken til kystnære vannmasser, inkludert flere meteorologiske parametere. Romania deltar i EMSO ERIC gjennom det nasjonale instituttet for marin geologi og geoøkologi (GeoEcoMar). Gjennom dette bidraget leveres sanntidsdata om fysikalsk-kjemiske og biologiske parametere i vannsøylen på ulike dybder, samt tidligvarslingsdata knyttet til marine farer. Datakilden er EUXINUS-nettverket av marine og kystnære observatorier, bestående av tre offshore-observatorier og ett kystobservatorium. Data lagres i databasen til det nasjonale senteret for overvåking og varsling av marine naturfarer, drevet av Constanța-avdelingen av GeoEcoMar.
belongs to
Finansiert prosjekt c
has facts
homepage op index en.html ni
Project is led by an organisation op GeoEcoMar ni
har land op Romania ni
has location op Black Sea ni
alternative label ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS network"@en
definition ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS er et regionalt sikkerhetssystem for det vestlige Svartehavet som gir sanntidsvarsler om marine geologiske farer, som undersjøiske skred, bevegelser langs aktive forkastninger, undersjøiske jordskjelv og tsunamibølger, samtidig som det overvåker egenskapene og dynamikken til kystnære vannmasser, inkludert flere meteorologiske parametere. Romania deltar i EMSO ERIC gjennom det nasjonale instituttet for marin geologi og geoøkologi (GeoEcoMar). Gjennom dette bidraget leveres sanntidsdata om fysikalsk-kjemiske og biologiske parametere i vannsøylen på ulike dybder, samt tidligvarslingsdata knyttet til marine farer. Datakilden er EUXINUS-nettverket av marine og kystnære observatorier, bestående av tre offshore-observatorier og ett kystobservatorium. Data lagres i databasen til det nasjonale senteret for overvåking og varsling av marine naturfarer, drevet av Constanța-avdelingen av GeoEcoMar."@no
definition ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS es un sistema regional de seguridad para el oeste del mar Negro que proporciona alertas en tiempo real sobre riesgos geológicos marinos, como deslizamientos submarinos, movimientos de fallas activas, terremotos submarinos y tsunamis, al tiempo que supervisa las características y la dinámica de las masas de agua costeras, incluidos varios parámetros meteorológicos. Rumanía participa en EMSO ERIC a través del Instituto Nacional de Geología y Geoecología Marina (GeoEcoMar). Gracias a esta contribución, se proporcionan datos en tiempo real sobre los parámetros fisicoquímicos y biológicos de la columna de agua a diferentes profundidades, así como datos de alerta temprana relacionados con riesgos marinos. La fuente de estos datos es la red EUXINUS de observatorios marinos y costeros, compuesta por tres observatorios en alta mar y uno costero. Los datos se almacenan en la base de datos del Centro Nacional de Monitorización y Alerta de Riesgos Naturales Marinos, gestionado por la sucursal de Constanța de GeoEcoMar."@es
definition ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS est un système régional de sécurité pour l’ouest de la mer Noire, fournissant des alertes en temps réel sur les aléas géologiques marins tels que les glissements sous-marins, les mouvements de failles actives, les séismes sous-marins et les tsunamis, tout en surveillant les caractéristiques et la dynamique des masses d’eau côtières, y compris plusieurs paramètres météorologiques. La Roumanie participe à EMSO ERIC par l’intermédiaire de l’Institut national de géologie et de géoécologie marines (GeoEcoMar). Grâce à cette contribution, des données en temps réel sur les paramètres physico-chimiques et biologiques de la colonne d’eau à différentes profondeurs sont fournies, ainsi que des données d’alerte précoce liées aux risques marins. La source de ces données est le réseau EUXINUS d’observatoires marins et côtiers, composé de trois observatoires offshore et d’un observatoire côtier. Les données sont stockées dans la base de données du Centre national de surveillance et d’alerte des aléas naturels marins, exploité par la branche de Constanța de GeoEcoMar."@fr
definition ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS este un sistem regional de securitate pentru vestul Mării Negre care furnizează alerte în timp real privind riscurile geologice marine, precum alunecări submarine, mișcări ale faliilor active, cutremure submarine și valuri de tsunami, monitorizând în același timp caracteristicile și dinamica maselor de apă costiere, inclusiv mai mulți parametri meteorologici. România participă la EMSO ERIC prin Institutul Național de Geologie și Geoecologie Marină (GeoEcoMar). Prin această contribuție, sunt furnizate date în timp real privind parametrii fizico-chimici și biologici ai coloanei de apă la diferite adâncimi, precum și date de avertizare timpurie legate de riscurile marine. Sursa acestor date este rețeaua EUXINUS de observatoare marine și costiere, formată din trei observatoare offshore și unul costier. Datele sunt stocate în baza de date a Centrului Național de Monitorizare și Avertizare a Riscurilor Naturale Marine, operată de filiala Constanța a GeoEcoMar."@ro
definition ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS is a regional security system for the western Black Sea providing real-time alerts for marine geohazards, such as submarine landslides, active fault movements, submarine earthquakes and tsunami waves, while also monitoring the characteristics and dynamics of coastal water bodies, including several meteorological parameters. Romania participates in EMSO ERIC through the National Institute of Marine Geology and Geoecology (GeoEcoMar). Through this contribution, real-time data on physico-chemical and biological parameters of the water column at different depths, as well as early warning data related to marine hazards, are provided to EMSO ERIC. The source of these data is the EUXINUS network of marine and coastal observatories, consisting of three offshore observatories and one coastal observatory. Data are stored in the database of the National Centre for Monitoring and Alerting of Marine Natural Hazards, operated by the Constanța branch of GeoEcoMar."@en
definition ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS è un sistema regionale di sicurezza per il Mar Nero occidentale che fornisce allerte in tempo reale sui rischi geologici marini, come frane sottomarine, movimenti di faglie attive, terremoti sottomarini e tsunami, monitorando al contempo le caratteristiche e la dinamica delle masse d’acqua costiere, inclusi diversi parametri meteorologici. La Romania partecipa a EMSO ERIC tramite l’Istituto Nazionale di Geologia e Geoecologia Marina (GeoEcoMar). Grazie a questo contributo, vengono forniti dati in tempo reale sui parametri fisico-chimici e biologici della colonna d’acqua a diverse profondità, nonché dati di allerta precoce relativi ai rischi marini. La fonte di questi dati è la rete EUXINUS di osservatori marini e costieri, composta da tre osservatori offshore e uno costiero. I dati sono archiviati nel database del Centro Nazionale di Monitoraggio e Allerta dei Rischi Naturali Marini, gestito dalla filiale di Constanța di GeoEcoMar."@it
definition ap "IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS é um sistema regional de segurança para o oeste do Mar Negro que fornece alertas em tempo real sobre riscos geológicos marinhos, como deslizamentos submarinos, movimentos de falhas ativas, sismos submarinos e tsunamis, ao mesmo tempo que monitoriza as características e a dinâmica das massas de água costeiras, incluindo vários parâmetros meteorológicos. A Roménia participa no EMSO ERIC através do Instituto Nacional de Geologia e Geoecologia Marinha (GeoEcoMar). Através desta contribuição, são fornecidos dados em tempo real sobre parâmetros físico-químicos e biológicos da coluna de água a diferentes profundidades, bem como dados de alerta precoce relacionados com riscos marinhos. A fonte destes dados é a rede EUXINUS de observatórios marinhos e costeiros, composta por três observatórios offshore e um observatório costeiro. Os dados são armazenados na base de dados do Centro Nacional de Monitorização e Alerta de Riscos Naturais Marinhos, operado pela filial de Constanța do GeoEcoMar."@pt
definition ap "Το IOSIN EMSO-EUXINUS είναι ένα περιφερειακό σύστημα ασφάλειας για τη δυτική Μαύρη Θάλασσα, το οποίο παρέχει ειδοποιήσεις σε πραγματικό χρόνο για θαλάσσιους γεωκινδύνους, όπως υποθαλάσσιες κατολισθήσεις, κινήσεις ενεργών ρηγμάτων, υποθαλάσσιους σεισμούς και κύματα τσουνάμι, ενώ παράλληλα παρακολουθεί τα χαρακτηριστικά και τη δυναμική των παράκτιων υδάτινων σωμάτων, συμπεριλαμβανομένων διαφόρων μετεωρολογικών παραμέτρων. Η Ρουμανία συμμετέχει στο EMSO ERIC μέσω του Εθνικού Ινστιτούτου Θαλάσσιας Γεωλογίας και Γεωοικολογίας (GeoEcoMar). Μέσω αυτής της συνεισφοράς, παρέχονται σε πραγματικό χρόνο δεδομένα για τις φυσικοχημικές και βιολογικές παραμέτρους της υδάτινης στήλης σε διαφορετικά βάθη, καθώς και δεδομένα έγκαιρης προειδοποίησης για θαλάσσιους κινδύνους. Η πηγή αυτών των δεδομένων είναι το δίκτυο EUXINUS των θαλάσσιων και παράκτιων παρατηρητηρίων, το οποίο αποτελείται από τρία υπεράκτια και ένα παράκτιο παρατηρητήριο. Τα δεδομένα αποθηκεύονται στη βάση δεδομένων του Εθνικού Κέντρου Παρακολούθησης και Έγκαιρης Προειδοποίησης Θαλάσσιων Φυσικών Κινδύνων, το οποίο λειτουργεί από το παράρτημα της Constanța του GeoEcoMar."@el
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@el
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@en
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@es
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@fr
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@it
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@no
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@pt
preferred label ap "EUXINUS"@ro

EuxRo01 surface buoyni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#EuxRo01_surface_buoy

Iberian Marginni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Iberian_Margin

belongs to
Regional fasilitet c
has facts
homepage op https://emso-pt.pt/ ni
homepage op https://emso.eu/observatories-node/iberian-margin/ ni
Regional Facility is part of a Research Infrastructure op EMSO Portugal ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op IbMa-CSV Sao Vicente Canyon ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op IbMa-CSV Seabed Station ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op IbMa-CSV TUPEM Fixed SubSurface Vertical Profiler ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op IbMa-CS TUPEM SubSurface Mooring ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op IbMa-N ni
har medlemskap i et ERIC op Iberian Margin E M S O membership ni
Regional Faciliy has a Regional Team Leader op Carlos SOUSA ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op IPMA ni
Distance from land dp "11"^^integer
Dato for første utplassering dp "2021-05-01"^^date
has max depth dp "1200"^^integer
description ap "The area of Gulf of Cadiz is very important for geo-hazards. It was the site where one of the worst earthquakes that hit Europe occurred in 1755, coupled with a destructive tsunami. Here African and European tectonic plates converge. It is a seismic volcanic region. The Iberian Margin is also a pivotal ocean region where Atlantic and Mediterranean exchange waters, with the later spreading at intermediate levels playing a key role in the salt and heat budget and AMOC (Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation). The Iberian Margin is the northernmost region of the productive CCUS (Canary Current Upwelling System), one of the four EBUS (Eastern Boundary Upwelling Systems) of the global ocean, where a highly variable upwelling regime dominates along with a strong mesoscale activity. The geologic and oceanographic features of this region favour the presence of highly diverse benthic communities and have also a central role in the distribution of several marine mammals and fish species."@en
spatial dp Gulf of Cadiz ep
note ap "IbMa"@en
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@el
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@en
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@es
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@fr
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@it
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@no
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@pt
preferred label ap "Iberian Margin"@ro

has facts

description ap "Local de observatório marinho planeado, ainda não implantado e sem plataformas associadas."@pt
description ap "Planlagt marint observatorium, ennå ikke utplassert og uten tilknyttede plattformer."@no
description ap "Planned marine observatory site, not yet deployed and currently without associated platforms."@en
description ap "Sit de observator marin planificat, încă nedesfășurat și fără platforme asociate."@ro
description ap "Site d’observatoire marin planifié, non encore déployé et ne disposant pas encore de plateformes associées."@fr
description ap "Sitio de observatorio marino planificado, aún no desplegado y sin plataformas asociadas actualmente."@es
description ap "Sito di osservatorio marino pianificato, non ancora operativo e senza piattaforme associate."@it
description ap "Σχεδιαζόμενο θαλάσσιο παρατηρητήριο, που δεν έχει ακόμη αναπτυχθεί και δεν διαθέτει σχετικές πλατφόρμες."@el
preferred label ap "IbMa-N"@el
preferred label ap "IbMa-N"@en

LIFE Marhani back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Marha

belongs to
Finansiert prosjekt c
has facts
homepage op https://www.life-marha.fr/ ni
Project is led by an organisation op Franske biodiversitetskontoret ni
har land op Frankrike ni
har logo op life marha.jpg ni
description ap "Det integrerte LIFE-prosjektet Marha (Marine Habitats) har som mål å gjenopprette og opprettholde en god bevaringstilstand for naturlige marine habitater i fastlands-Frankrike. Fra 2018 til 2025 ble mer enn 650 tiltak innen vurdering, utprøving, forvaltning, bevisstgjøring og opplæring gjennomført, med deltakelse fra alle aktører involvert i forvaltningen av marine Natura 2000-områder."@no
description ap "El proyecto integrado LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) tiene como objetivo restaurar y mantener el buen estado de conservación de los hábitats marinos naturales en la Francia metropolitana. Entre 2018 y 2025, se llevaron a cabo más de 650 acciones de evaluación, experimentación, gestión, sensibilización y formación, movilizando a todos los actores implicados en la gestión de los sitios Natura 2000 en el mar."@es
description ap "Il progetto LIFE integrato Marha (Marine Habitats) mira a ripristinare e mantenere il buono stato di conservazione degli habitat marini naturali nella Francia metropolitana. Dal 2018 al 2025 sono state realizzate oltre 650 azioni di valutazione, sperimentazione, gestione, sensibilizzazione e formazione, mobilitando tutti gli attori coinvolti nella gestione dei siti Natura 2000 marini."@it
description ap "Le projet LIFE intégré Marha (Marine Habitats) vise à rétablir et à maintenir le bon état de conservation des habitats naturels marins en France hexagonale. De 2018 à 2025, plus de 650 actions d’évaluation, d’expérimentation, de gestion, de sensibilisation et de formation ont été mises en œuvre, en mobilisant l’ensemble des acteurs impliqués dans la gestion des sites Natura 2000 en mer."@fr
description ap "O projeto integrado LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) tem como objetivo restaurar e manter o bom estado de conservação dos habitats marinhos naturais na França continental. Entre 2018 e 2025, foram implementadas mais de 650 ações de avaliação, experimentação, gestão, sensibilização e formação, mobilizando todos os atores envolvidos na gestão dos sítios Natura 2000 marinhos."@pt
description ap "Proiectul integrat LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) are ca obiectiv restabilirea și menținerea unei stări favorabile de conservare a habitatelor marine naturale din Franța continentală. Între 2018 și 2025 au fost implementate peste 650 de acțiuni de evaluare, experimentare, gestionare, sensibilizare și formare, mobilizând toți actorii implicați în gestionarea siturilor marine Natura 2000."@ro
description ap "The LIFE Integrated Project Marha (Marine Habitats) aims to restore and maintain the favourable conservation status of natural marine habitats in mainland France. From 2018 to 2025, more than 650 actions involving assessment, experimentation, management, awareness-raising and training were implemented, mobilising all stakeholders involved in the management of Natura 2000 marine sites."@en
description ap "Το ολοκληρωμένο πρόγραμμα LIFE Marha (Marine Habitats) στοχεύει στην αποκατάσταση και διατήρηση της καλής κατάστασης διατήρησης των φυσικών θαλάσσιων οικοτόπων στη μητροπολιτική Γαλλία. Από το 2018 έως το 2025, υλοποιήθηκαν περισσότερες από 650 δράσεις αξιολόγησης, πειραματισμού, διαχείρισης, ευαισθητοποίησης και κατάρτισης, κινητοποιώντας το σύνολο των φορέων που εμπλέκονται στη διαχείριση των θαλάσσιων περιοχών Natura 2000."@el
title ap "LIFE Marha"@el
title ap "LIFE Marha"@en
title ap "LIFE Marha"@es
title ap "LIFE Marha"@fr
title ap "LIFE Marha"@it
title ap "LIFE Marha"@no
title ap "LIFE Marha"@pt

Liguriahavetni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Ligurian_Sea

Regional infrastruktur som dekker et bredt marint område i det nordvestlige Middelhavet, inkludert Liguriahavet, den franske rivieraen, Løvegolfen og det mellomliggende havområdet.
belongs to
Regional fasilitet c
has facts
has close match op French Riviera ni
has close match op Gulf of Lion ni
homepage op www-emso-fr-org: ni
Regional Facility is part of a Research Infrastructure op EMSO-France ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op BILLION ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op DYFAMED ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op LION ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op LO ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op Nice ni
Regional Facility has a bouding box op Ligurian Sea Regional Facility bounding box ni
har medlemskap i et ERIC op Ligurian Sea E M S O membership ni
Regional Faciliy has a Regional Team Leader op Laurent COPPOLA ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op CNRS ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op Ifremer ni
Regional Facility is linked to a Series of Cruises op EMSO LIGURE OUEST ni
Regional Facility is linked to a Series of Cruises op MOOSE-GE ni
Regional Facility is linked to a Series of Cruises op MUG-OBS ni
Dato for første utplassering dp "1998-01-01"^^date
description ap "Această infrastructură regională acoperă o regiune marină activă seismic caracterizată printr-o pantă continentală îngustă și abruptă, reliefuri alpine, canioane submarine, instabilitatea versanților, influențe atmosferice puternice și implicații semnificative pentru riscurile seismice, tsunami și producția de biomasă marină."@ro
description ap "Cette installation régionale couvre une zone marine sismiquement active caractérisée par une pente continentale étroite et abrupte, des reliefs alpins, des canyons sous-marins, une instabilité des pentes, de fortes influences atmosphériques et des enjeux importants en matière de risques sismiques, de tsunamis et de production de biomasse marine."@fr
description ap "Denne regionale infrastrukturen dekker et seismisk aktivt havområde preget av en smal og bratt kontinentalskråning, alpine relieffer, undersjøiske canyoner, skråningsustabilitet, sterke atmosfæriske påvirkninger og betydelige konsekvenser for seismisk risiko, tsunamier og marin biomasseproduksjon."@no
description ap "Esta infraestructura regional cubre una región marina sísmicamente activa caracterizada por una pendiente continental estrecha y abrupta, relieves alpinos, cañones submarinos, inestabilidad de laderas, fuertes influencias atmosféricas e importantes implicaciones en riesgos sísmicos, tsunamis y producción de biomasa marina."@es
description ap "Esta infraestrutura regional cobre uma região marinha sismicamente ativa caracterizada por uma plataforma continental estreita e íngreme, relevos alpinos, canhões submarinos, instabilidade de encostas, fortes influências atmosféricas e implicações significativas para riscos sísmicos, tsunamis e produção de biomassa marinha."@pt
description ap "Questa infrastruttura regionale copre una regione marina sismicamente attiva caratterizzata da una scarpata continentale stretta e ripida, rilievi alpini, canyon sottomarini, instabilità dei versanti, forti influenze atmosferiche e importanti implicazioni per il rischio sismico, gli tsunami e la produzione di biomassa marina."@it
description ap "This Regional Facility covers an active seismic marine region characterized by a narrow and steep continental slope, alpine reliefs, submarine canyons, slope instability, strong atmospheric inputs, and significant implications for seismic hazard, tsunami risk, and marine biomass production."@en
description ap "Αυτή η περιφερειακή υποδομή καλύπτει μια σεισμικά ενεργή θαλάσσια περιοχή που χαρακτηρίζεται από στενή και απότομη ηπειρωτική κλίση, αλπικά ανάγλυφα, υποθαλάσσια φαράγγια, αστάθεια πρανών, έντονες ατμοσφαιρικές επιδράσεις και σημαντικές επιπτώσεις σε σεισμικούς κινδύνους, τσουνάμι και παραγωγή θαλάσσιας βιομάζας."@el
preferred label ap "Liguriahavet"@no
preferred label ap "Ligurian Sea"@en
preferred label ap "Mar Ligure"@it
preferred label ap "Mar da Ligúria"@pt
preferred label ap "Mar de Ligur"@es
preferred label ap "Marea Ligurică"@ro
preferred label ap "Mer Ligure"@fr
preferred label ap "Λιγουρική Θάλασσα"@el

MARMORni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#MARMOR

MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) er et åtteårig prosjekt finansiert av ANR. MARMOR-prosjektet har to mål: å strukturere det franske vitenskapelige miljøet ved å gi forskningsinfrastrukturen Epos-France (tidligere Résif) utstyret som trengs for å gjennomføre forskning på høyt nivå med bruk av undervannsseismologi og geodesiverktøy, å etablere en undervanns observasjonsinfrastruktur på Mayotte for å sikre kontinuerlig, sanntids og døgnkontinuerlig seismologisk overvåking, samt støtte tverrfaglig forskning på fenomenene knyttet til den pågående seismo-vulkanske krisen.
belongs to
Finansiert prosjekt c
has facts
homepage op fr ni
har land op Frankrike ni
has location op Mayotte ni
har logo op marmor.png ni
alternative label ap "Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response"@en
definition ap "MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) er et åtteårig prosjekt finansiert av ANR. MARMOR-prosjektet har to mål: å strukturere det franske vitenskapelige miljøet ved å gi forskningsinfrastrukturen Epos-France (tidligere Résif) utstyret som trengs for å gjennomføre forskning på høyt nivå med bruk av undervannsseismologi og geodesiverktøy, å etablere en undervanns observasjonsinfrastruktur på Mayotte for å sikre kontinuerlig, sanntids og døgnkontinuerlig seismologisk overvåking, samt støtte tverrfaglig forskning på fenomenene knyttet til den pågående seismo-vulkanske krisen."@no
definition ap "MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) es un proyecto de ocho años financiado por la ANR. El proyecto MARMOR tiene un doble objetivo: estructurar la comunidad científica francesa proporcionando a la infraestructura de investigación Epos-France (antes Résif) el equipamiento necesario para llevar a cabo investigaciones de excelencia utilizando herramientas de sismología y geodesia submarinas, poner en marcha una infraestructura de observación submarina en Mayotte para garantizar la vigilancia sismológica continua, en tiempo real y 24/7, y desarrollar investigaciones multidisciplinares sobre los fenómenos asociados a la crisis sismo-volcánica en curso."@es
definition ap "MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) est un projet d’une durée de huit ans financé par l’ANR. Le projet MARMOR a un double objectif : structurer la communauté scientifique française en fournissant à l’infrastructure de recherche Epos-France (anciennement Résif) les équipements nécessaires pour conduire des recherches d’excellence utilisant les outils de la sismologie et de la géodésie sous-marines, mettre en place une infrastructure d’observation sous-marine à Mayotte afin d’assurer une surveillance sismologique continue, en temps réel et 24/7, et de conduire des recherches multidisciplinaires sur les phénomènes associés à la crise sismo-volcanique en cours."@fr
definition ap "MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) este un proiect cu durata de opt ani finanțat de ANR. Proiectul MARMOR are un dublu obiectiv: să structureze comunitatea științifică franceză, furnizând infrastructurii de cercetare Epos-France (fost Résif) echipamentele necesare pentru desfășurarea unor cercetări de excelență folosind instrumente de seismologie și geodezie submarine, să implementeze o infrastructură de observare submarină în Mayotte pentru a asigura monitorizarea seismologică continuă, în timp real și 24/7, precum și pentru a sprijini cercetarea multidisciplinară asupra fenomenelor asociate crizei seismo-vulcanice în curs."@ro
definition ap "MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) is an eight-year project funded by the ANR. The MARMOR project has two objectives: to structure the French scientific community by providing the Epos-France research infrastructure (formerly Résif) with the equipment required to conduct high-level research using submarine seismology and geodesy tools, to establish an underwater observation infrastructure in Mayotte in order to ensure continuous, real-time, 24/7 seismological monitoring and to support multidisciplinary research on the phenomena associated with the ongoing seismo-volcanic crisis."@en
definition ap "MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) è un progetto della durata di otto anni finanziato dall’ANR. Il progetto MARMOR ha un duplice obiettivo: strutturare la comunità scientifica francese fornendo all’infrastruttura di ricerca Epos-France (precedentemente Résif) le attrezzature necessarie per svolgere ricerche di eccellenza utilizzando strumenti di sismologia e geodesia sottomarina, realizzare un’infrastruttura di osservazione sottomarina a Mayotte per garantire una sorveglianza sismologica continua, in tempo reale e 24/7, e sostenere ricerche multidisciplinari sui fenomeni associati alla crisi sismo-vulcanica in corso."@it
definition ap "MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) é um projeto com duração de oito anos financiado pela ANR. O projeto MARMOR tem um duplo objetivo: estruturar a comunidade científica francesa, fornecendo à infraestrutura de investigação Epos-France (anteriormente Résif) os equipamentos necessários para realizar investigação de excelência com recurso a ferramentas de sismologia e geodesia submarinas, instalar uma infraestrutura de observação submarina em Mayotte para assegurar uma vigilância sismológica contínua, em tempo real e 24/7, e apoiar investigação multidisciplinar sobre os fenómenos associados à crise sismo-vulcânica em curso."@pt
definition ap "Το MARMOR (Marine Advanced Geophysical Research Equipment and Mayotte Multidisciplinary Observatory for Research and Response) είναι ένα οκταετές έργο που χρηματοδοτείται από την ANR. Το έργο MARMOR έχει διπλό στόχο: να δομήσει τη γαλλική επιστημονική κοινότητα, παρέχοντας στην ερευνητική υποδομή Epos-France (πρώην Résif) τον απαραίτητο εξοπλισμό για την ανάπτυξη ερευνητικής αριστείας με χρήση εργαλείων υποθαλάσσιας σεισμολογίας και γεωδαισίας, να εγκαταστήσει μια υποθαλάσσια υποδομή παρατήρησης στη Μαγιότ, ώστε να καλύπτει τις ανάγκες συνεχούς, σε πραγματικό χρόνο και 24/7 σεισμολογικής επιτήρησης και να υποστηρίζει διεπιστημονική έρευνα για τα φαινόμενα που σχετίζονται με την εν εξελίξει σεισμοηφαιστειακή κρίση."@el
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@el
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@en
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@es
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@fr
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@it
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@no
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@pt
preferred label ap "MARMOR"@ro

NOCni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#NOC

belongs to
Organization c
has facts
has exact match op 00874hx02 ni
homepage op https://noc.ac.uk/ ni
har land op Storbritannia ni
har en EDMO op 17 ni
har en ROR op 00874hx02 ni
description ap "El NOC es el Centro Nacional de Oceanografía del Reino Unido, dedicado a la ciencia y tecnología oceánica."@es
description ap "Il NOC è il Centro Nazionale di Oceanografia del Regno Unito, dedicato alla scienza e alla tecnologia oceanica."@it
description ap "Le NOC est le Centre national d’océanographie du Royaume-Uni, dédié à la science et aux technologies océaniques."@fr
description ap "NOC er Storbritannias nasjonale senter for oseanografi, dedikert til havforskning og teknologi."@no
description ap "NOC este Centrul Național de Oceanografie al Regatului Unit, dedicat științei și tehnologiei oceanice."@ro
description ap "NOC is the United Kingdom’s National Oceanography Centre, dedicated to ocean science and technology."@en
description ap "O NOC é o Centro Nacional de Oceanografia do Reino Unido, dedicado à ciência e tecnologia oceânica."@pt
description ap "Το NOC είναι το Εθνικό Κέντρο Ωκεανογραφίας του Ηνωμένου Βασιλείου, αφιερωμένο στην επιστήμη και την τεχνολογία των ωκεανών."@el
alternative label ap "National Oceanography Centre"@en
preferred label ap "NOC"@el
preferred label ap "NOC"@en
preferred label ap "NOC"@es
preferred label ap "NOC"@fr
preferred label ap "NOC"@it
preferred label ap "NOC"@no
preferred label ap "NOC"@pt
preferred label ap "NOC"@ro

Nordic Seasni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Nordic_Seas

Den regionale infrastrukturen Nordic Seas omfatter 5 seksjoner med havglidere, 4 fortøyningsstasjoner og ett multi-array observatorium. Den kombinerer eksisterende overvåkingskomponenter, som utvides, med nye installasjoner, med mål om å forbedre forståelsen av Nordic Seas sin rolle i det globale klimasystemet. Forskningen fokuserer på: Vanntransport, sirkulasjon og egenskaper til vannmassene i Nordic Seas Biogeokjemi under overflaten • Metanutslipp fra havbunnen Variabilitet i fronter mellom polare og atlantiske vannmasser Geofysisk, oseanografisk og økologisk karakterisering av hydrotermale kilder Aktiviteten vises på kartet med gliderbaner (røde linjer), fortøyninger (hvite sirkler) og observatorium (EMSO-Mohn). EMSO-fagområder: fysisk oseanografi, biogeokjemi, marin økologi (planlagt)
belongs to
Regional fasilitet c
has facts
homepage op noremso ni
Regional Facility is part of a Research Infrastructure op NorEMSO ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op Central Fram Strait ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op Mohn ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op South Cape ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op Station M ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op Svinøy ni
har medlemskap i et ERIC op Nordic Seas E M S O membership ni
Regional Faciliy has a Regional Team Leader op Ilker FER ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op UiB ni
Dato for første utplassering dp "2020-10-01"^^date
has max depth dp "3050"^^integer
spatial dp Norwegian Sea ep
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@el
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@en
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@es
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@fr
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@it
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@no
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@pt
preferred label ap "Nordic Seas"@ro

has facts
er medlemskap i et ERIC for op Nordic Seas ni
medlemskap i et ERIC op EMSO ni
start Date dp "2021-01-21"^^date

Planlagtni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Planned

Et sted som er planlagt, men ennå ikke utplassert eller i drift.
belongs to
Concept c
has facts
definition ap "A site that is planned but not yet deployed or operational."@en
definition ap "Et sted som er planlagt, men ennå ikke utplassert eller i drift."@no
definition ap "Um sítio planeado mas ainda não implantado nem operacional."@pt
definition ap "Un sit planificat, dar încă nedesfășurat sau operațional."@ro
definition ap "Un site planifié mais non encore déployé ni opérationnel."@fr
definition ap "Un sitio que está planificado pero aún no desplegado ni operativo."@es
definition ap "Un sito pianificato ma non ancora implementato né operativo."@it
definition ap "Σχεδιαζόμενο: τόπος που έχει προγραμματιστεί αλλά δεν έχει ακόμη αναπτυχθεί ή λειτουργήσει."@el
preferred label ap "Pianificato"@it
preferred label ap "Planeado"@pt
preferred label ap "Planificado"@es
preferred label ap "Planificat"@ro
preferred label ap "Planifié"@fr
preferred label ap "Planlagt"@no
preferred label ap "Planned"@en
preferred label ap "Σχεδιαζόμενο"@el

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#REVOSIMA

belongs to
Finansiert prosjekt c
has facts
has exact match op Q66811844 ni
homepage op https://www.ipgp.fr/en/observation/national-hosted-infrastructures/revosima/ ni
homepage op https://www.ipgp.fr/observation/infrastructures-nationales-hebergees/revosima/ ni
Project is led by an organisation op BRGM ni
Project is led by an organisation op CNRS ni
Project is led by an organisation op IPGP ni
Project is led by an organisation op Ifremer ni
har logo op revosima.png ni
description ap "REVOSIMA er overvåkingsnettverket for vulkanologi og seismologi på Mayotte, som støtter kontinuerlig observasjon av pågående seismo-vulkansk aktivitet."@no
description ap "REVOSIMA es la red de vigilancia volcanológica y sismológica de Mayotte que apoya la observación continua de la actividad sismo-volcánica en curso."@es
description ap "REVOSIMA est le réseau de surveillance volcanologique et sismologique de Mayotte assurant le suivi continu de l’activité sismo-volcanique en cours."@fr
description ap "REVOSIMA este rețeaua de monitorizare vulcanologică și seismologică din Mayotte, care susține observarea continuă a activității seismo-vulcanice în desfășurare."@ro
description ap "REVOSIMA is the Mayotte volcanological and seismological monitoring network supporting continuous observation of the ongoing seismo-volcanic activity."@en
description ap "REVOSIMA è la rete di monitoraggio vulcanologico e sismologico di Mayotte che supporta l’osservazione continua dell’attività sismo-vulcanica in corso."@it
description ap "REVOSIMA é a rede de monitorização vulcanológica e sismológica de Mayotte, que apoia a observação contínua da atividade sismo-vulcânica em curso."@pt
description ap "Το REVOSIMA είναι το δίκτυο ηφαιστειολογικής και σεισμολογικής παρακολούθησης της Μαγιότ, που υποστηρίζει τη συνεχή παρατήρηση της εν εξελίξει σεισμοηφαιστειακής δραστηριότητας."@el
alternative label ap "Mayotte Volcanological and Seismological Monitoring Network"@en
alternative label ap "Réseau de surveillance volcanologique et sismologique de Mayotte"@fr
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@el
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@en
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@es
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@fr
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@it
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@no
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@pt
preferred label ap "REVOSIMA"@ro

Smartbay Observatoryni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Smartbay_observatory

The SmartBay cabled observatory is connected to a shorestation via a 5km long subsea fibre optic power cable. This cable provides power to the observatory and facilitates high speed communication with the various instruments and sensors deployed. The observatory operates a core suite of sensors which measure several EOVs and other relevant environmental indicators. These instruments include CTD, Ph, dissolved oxygen, pco2, hydrophones, HD camera, flow cytometer and ADCP. These instruments are cabled to a central electronics node. This node also includes several additional ports and cables with multiple power and communications configurations which are available to host other novel sensors and instruments. The testing and demonstration of new and novel equipment is one of the main drivers behind the SmartBay facility, allowing researchers and industry the ability to trial their technology in the marine environment whilst also being in real time communication with their equipment at all times. Environmental data recorded by the various infrastructures at the SmartBay facility is streamed in real time to Marine Institute servers and subsequently to various online platforms and databases. The online data currently includes live video and audio, currents, wave data and feeds from the several instruments currently deployed.
belongs to
Observasjonsplattform c
has facts
has platform category op http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/collection/L06/current/11/ ni
Platform has a Principal Investigator op Alan BERRY ni
Dato for første utplassering dp "2015-10-08"^^date
alternative label ap "Galway Bay Cabled Observatory"@en
definition ap "The SmartBay cabled observatory is connected to a shorestation via a 5km long subsea fibre optic power cable. This cable provides power to the observatory and facilitates high speed communication with the various instruments and sensors deployed. The observatory operates a core suite of sensors which measure several EOVs and other relevant environmental indicators. These instruments include CTD, Ph, dissolved oxygen, pco2, hydrophones, HD camera, flow cytometer and ADCP. These instruments are cabled to a central electronics node. This node also includes several additional ports and cables with multiple power and communications configurations which are available to host other novel sensors and instruments. The testing and demonstration of new and novel equipment is one of the main drivers behind the SmartBay facility, allowing researchers and industry the ability to trial their technology in the marine environment whilst also being in real time communication with their equipment at all times. Environmental data recorded by the various infrastructures at the SmartBay facility is streamed in real time to Marine Institute servers and subsequently to various online platforms and databases. The online data currently includes live video and audio, currents, wave data and feeds from the several instruments currently deployed."@en
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@el
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@en
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@es
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@fr
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@it
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@no
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@pt
preferred label ap "Smartbay Observatory"@ro

Western Mediterranean Seani back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/earthsemantics/OSO#Western_Mediterranean_Sea

Den regionale noden 'Western Mediterranean Sea' tilsvarer Liguriahavet, slik det er definert av Den internasjonale hydrografiske organisasjonen.
belongs to
Regional fasilitet c
has facts
Regional Facility is part of a Research Infrastructure op E M S O Italia ni
Regional Facility contains a Site op W1M3A ni
har medlemskap i et ERIC op Western Mediterranean Sea E M S O membership ni
Regional Faciliy has a Regional Team Leader op Roberto BOZZANO ni
Regional Facility is managed by an Organisation op CNR ni
spatial dp Ligurian Sea ep

preferred label ap "Western Mediterranean Sea"@es

Legend back to ToC

c: Classes
op: Object Properties
dp: Data Properties
ni: Named Individuals
ep: External Properties
